create.title: Create Team
create.supportedAgentsHint: LokCLI (Hermes) is recommended as team leader. Other supported CLIs can participate based on their collaboration mode.
create.leaderBlockedHint: Some installed runtimes are hidden here because they are worker-only, unsupported, or require a capability override before they can act as team leader.
create.leaderDesc: Understands your goals and coordinates agents to complete tasks

removeAgent.confirmContent: This member is currently active. Force remove?

runtime.title: Runtime Diagnostics
runtime.subtitle: Inspect runtime state and run recovery from the team page.
runtime.statusStripSubtitle: Recovery stays available in the background while the team view focuses on execution.
runtime.recoveryPreparedNoPlan: Recovery check complete: no replayable snapshot is available yet.
runtime.recoveryUnavailableToast: Recovery is not available for this team yet.
runtime.executionOverviewSubtitle: This reserved area will become the primary visualization surface for leader planning, worker progress, and cross-agent coordination.
runtime.executionOverviewStageGoalDetail: User intent, constraints, and workspace context will surface here.
runtime.executionOverviewStagePlanDetail: Leader to worker task routing and capability-aware assignment.
runtime.executionOverviewStageExecutionDetail: Multi-agent progress, blockers, and handoffs will be visualized here.
runtime.executionOverviewStageRecoveryDetail: Replay and resume status will join the same orchestration timeline.
runtime.executionOverviewStagePendingDetail: Queued and blocked work stays visible before we wire full orchestration lanes.
runtime.executionOverviewStageTimelineDetail: The newest orchestration or recovery event anchors the execution timeline.
runtime.executionOverviewTimelineEmpty: Runtime timeline will appear here once orchestration events start flowing.
runtime.executionOverviewLaneEmpty: This lane will fill with coordination, task, and recovery events.

emptyState.subtitle: Describe your goal and I'll get the team working on it

suggestions.debate: Organize a debate with agents taking different sides
suggestions.interview: Plan an in-depth interview between agents
suggestions.expert_review: Have multiple experts analyze the same problem
